steps.t: The boots needed for stomping on shrews can be found near the stairs of the Festival Garden. You should collect the boots from the crate and drag them…
The pesky shrews can be found in the centre of the garden in Duillond's Festival Garden space, and the shrew-stomping boots are in your inventory. You…
The pesky shrews can be found in the centre space of Duillond's Festival Garden. Logethuil has asked you to defeat many shrews, and also plant seedlin…
Logethuil is in the Garden of Duillond. You should bring news of your success to Logethuil.
